title: Event bus + observability audit

findings.subject: n8n
findings.recommended_action: Export/list workflows via n8n API credentials or DB read-only.

findings.subject: Langfuse
findings.recommended_action: Verify trace ingestion keys and agent SDK wiring.

findings.subject: Portainer
findings.recommended_action: Verify whether Portainer sees both Docker daemons/contexts.

findings.subject: Unified dashboard
findings.finding: No verified unified dashboard for agent status + container health + GitHub tasks + domain health exists.
findings.recommended_action: Fastest path: static /migration/audit + scheduled collectors; later Grafana/Prometheus + GitHub/Cloudflare exporters.

recommended_action: Build one read-only dashboard pipeline before adding auto-fix agents.
